signals.snippet: Subject: Ami, Missed Payment Alert 🚨\n\nBody: 96 Missed Payment Hope you are doing well! We wanted to let you know that your recent subscription renewal for Bloom Salon & Med Spa didn’t go through as planned. This can happen for simple reas

cause_analysis.narrative: Bloom Salon & Med Spa churned on 2026-03-30 after 283 days with Zoca. Sentiment turned negative on 2026-02-28 (email) — first complaint keyword: "issue". Classification: service complaint. Negative signals appeared but no explicit cancellation request.
recommendations: [Escalation] First negative sentiment on 2026-02-28 via email. Triggering a same-day AM touchpoint on any negative keyword would have caught this.
[Sentiment] Add an automated sentiment alerting layer over app_chat/email that pages the AM when negative keywords appear.
